calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Donald J. Sullivan; Clerk: V. Mack; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer (Dept. 318)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Edmond Yim Lui is present.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Sheryl Pinal is present.
Attorney, Megan C. Keifer, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 179 Del Vale Avenue, San Francisco, California 94127.

The case is settled. The trial date of AUG-15-2011 is vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Continued To Aug-10-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 318
